payload.description:
## Problem
Acceptance Rate report block uses outlined styles for the note and the show/hide item rows button, which violates dashboard visual guidelines.

## Behavior Spec
Feature: Acceptance Rate controls follow standard dashboard visual style
Scenario: Render Acceptance Rate block with large result set
Given item rows are hidden by default
When the block renders
Then the informational note does not have a border/outline container
And the show item rows control does not use outline/ghost border styling
And controls match standard muted text/button styling used by sibling report blocks.
payload.title: Acceptance Rate block: remove bordered hide/show item row controls
